scripts.lint:root: oxfmt --check AGENTS.md CONTRIBUTING.md README.ja.md README.md .gitignore .node-version .oxlintrc.json package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json turbo.json docs .github
scripts.fix:root: oxfmt --write AGENTS.md CONTRIBUTING.md README.ja.md README.md .gitignore .node-version .oxlintrc.json package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json turbo.json docs .github
scripts.ready: pnpm fix && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.ready:check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
